view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided indicates that the system successfully created a gate marking a time window as unavailable based on the queue's ETA signal. Specifically, the scenario describes how the queue predicted a barber's busy time and created a corresponding unavailable window, which aligns with the requirement. Additionally, the action request and domain event confirm that the calendar received a blocked window due to the queue ETA, demonstrating that the requirement is fully covered.
